name: LearnTube AI
tagline: Turn YouTube videos into a saved learning workspace.
description:
LearnTube AI converts one or more YouTube lessons into a structured study cockpit: smart notes, flashcards, quiz mode, action items, a topic roadmap, revision scheduling, weak-concept detection, and a grounded mentor Q&A flow.

**What's inside**

- A static Anna App UI built for focused learning workflows.
- `learntube-processor` - bundled Python Executa that extracts video metadata/transcripts when available and builds deterministic learning artifacts.
- Anna-hosted LLM enhancement through `anna.llm.complete` when granted, with deterministic fallback when LLM access is unavailable.
- Anna storage-backed history, XP, streaks, quiz progress, revision queues, and flashcard difficulty.

**How to use**

Paste a YouTube link or a small playlist of links, optionally paste transcript text, and choose **Learn**. Review the generated workspace, study flashcards, take the quiz, mark action items, ask grounded questions, and export a one-page cheat sheet.
_comment_bundled_executas: The bundled handle maps to ./executas/learntube-processor. Anna publish/push flows mint the real tool_id and write bundle/anna-tool-ids.js; source manifest.json keeps the bundled handle.
